calendar.matters:
DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Mar-27-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505
Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:40am and concluding at 9:56am.

Plaintiff Stonestown Shopping Center appearing represented by John Byrne, Esq., via zoom.
Defendant AKG Trade, Inc. not appearing.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.

Court reviews Memorandum of Costs.

Court examines witness for Plaintiff and Senior General Manager and Custodian of Records DARREN IVERSON and he confirms statements made by counsel.

The matter is submitted.

Based on the documents filed, the statement made by Plaintiff and its Counsel, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Stonestown Shopping Center LP, and against Defendant AKG Trade, Inc., as follows:

Past-Due Rent: $19,440.55
Holdover Damages: $38.364.00
Attorney Fees: $2,825.00
Costs: $630.00

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $61,259.55

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date.
